title: ArchivistAdvertisement v1
description: Machine-readable schema for archivist capability advertisements covering archival scope, retention posture, and optional settlement requirements.

advertisement/id.description: Stable identifier of the archivist capability advertisement.

archivist/node-id.description: Archivist node or durable storage actor.

accepted/scopes.description: Publication scopes this archivist is willing to accept.

retrieval/mode.description: Primary discovery or retrieval mode exposed by the archivist.

retention/default-max-duration-sec.description: Default maximum storage duration when no explicit contract overrides it.

retention/default-max-idle-ttl-sec.description: Default maximum idle TTL when no explicit contract overrides it.

replication/max-copies.description: Maximum replication copies this archivist is willing to coordinate.

publication/timing-profiles.description: Publication timing profiles the archivist supports.

settlement/required.description: Whether this archivist requires explicit negotiated settlement for storage.

settlement/rail-hints.description: Optional settlement rail hints when negotiated storage is required.

policy_annotations.description: Optional implementation-local annotations that do not change the core advertisement semantics.
